title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Are you a competitive person by nature?
Do you think sport builds character and teaches important life skills?
Do you follow any sports teams or athletes? Why?
Have you ever watched a major sporting event live? What was it like?
Do you think sport is given too much importance in society?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think competitive sport teaches children important values?
Is the amount of money in professional sport a problem for the sport itself?
Do you think winning is the most important thing in sport, or is participation more valuable?
